It handles the primary bead selection from assigned workspaces, processing >90% of all bead operations.\n\n**Note:** Pluck is NOT a standalone project - it is a component of NEEDLE. The dependencies listed below are for the full NEEDLE system, which includes the Pluck strand.\n\n---\n\n## Core Requirements\n\n### Rust Toolchain\n\n**Minimum Supported Rust Version (MSRV):** 1.75+ \"stable\"\ncomponents = [\"rustfmt\", \"clippy\"]\ntargets = [\"x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu\", \"aarch64-apple-darwin\"]\n```\n\n**Installation:**\n```bash\ncurl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf pkg-config libssl-dev\n```\n\n**Package Details:**\n- `git` - Version control system\n- `curl` - HTTP client for downloads\n- `jq` - JSON processor for output parsing\n- `build-essential` - C compiler ARMOR-Specific Dependencies\n\nIn addition to the core Pluck/NEEDLE requirements, ARMOR requires:\n\n**AWS SDK for Go v2:**\n- `github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2` - AWS service integration\n-
